description_long: This is a two-story apartment building with a flat roof and a boxy, modernist design. The exterior walls are primarily off-white with patches of weathering and discoloration, giving it a slightly aged appearance. The building features several rectangular windows with metal shutters, some of which are partially open, and a prominent central stairway leading to the main entrance. Small balconies are present on the upper floor, and the structure is surrounded by a few leafy green trees planted in reddish-brown soil beds. The roof has a raised section, possibly for utilities or access, and the overall form is simple and functional. The building sits on a rectangular plot with a paved walkway leading to the entrance.
description: A weathered, two-story modernist apartment building with flat roof, balconies, and metal-shuttered windows, surrounded by trees and reddish soil beds.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade with two windows on each floor, weathered walls, and trees flanking both sides.
description_view_1: Central stairway and main entrance are visible, with symmetrical windows and balconies on either side, and trees lining the walkway.
description_view_2: Rear view with more windows, a visible balcony, and trees on both sides, highlighting the building's rectangular shape.
description_view_3: Side view showing a single door, a window, and the raised roof section, with trees and soil beds adjacent to the building.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are symmetrically arranged in horizontal rows on both floors, with even spacing and alignment, and some grouped near the corners.
